# censusworkspace_sql_dataset (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the dataset.
- `query` (String) SQL query that defines the dataset.
- `source_id` (Number) ID of the source connection to run the query against.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description shown for this SQL dataset in Census.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Census identifier for this SQL dataset.
